heading: wordDelimiterGraph
body:
The `wordDelimiterGraph` token filter splits tokens into sub-tokens
based on configured rules. We recommend that you don't use this token
filter with the [standard](standard-tokenizer-ref) tokenizer
because this tokenizer removes many of the intra-word delimiters that
this token filter uses to determine boundaries.

> **Note:** 
>
> For querying with [regex](regex-ref) or [wildcard](wildcard-ref), you can't use
> wordDelimiterGraph token filter as the `searchAnalyzer` as it produces more than one
> output token per input token. Specify a different analyzer as the
> `searchAnalyzer` in your index definition.
